questions: interior design tips for small rooms?
how to make a room look bigger?
answers: Interior design is the art of enhancing interior spaces to be functional, safe, and aesthetically pleasing. It involves color, furniture, lighting, textures, and layout planning.
Small room er jonno light colors use koro, mirrors lagao, multi-functional furniture choose koro, ar clutter komi rakhho. Vertical storage use korle space save hoy.
Low budget interior design ideas: repaint walls, rearrange furniture, add plants, use fairy lights, DIY artwork, thrift store finds, and new curtains. Small changes make a big difference.

Current interior design trends include minimalism, natural materials, earth tones, indoor plants, sustainable furniture, and mixing modern with vintage pieces. Focus on creating a space that feels like you.
